name: Overdrive Escape
short_description: Miami City. 2054. The Ichido Corporation creates biological robots (replicants). A revolution begins, and the replicants help you escape from the corporation, as you are not human either, having been grown in a test tube as a weapon for future use.
detailed_description:
Story


Miami City. The year is 2054. The Ichido Corporation creates biological robots (replicants). A revolution begins, and the replicants help you escape from the corporation, as you are not human either, having been grown in a test tube as a weapon for future use. Brutal experiments were conducted on you to test your strength, and after each death, you wake up at the beginning of the same day. You have dreamed of this day all your life, and now you can fulfill your dream by escaping from the main headquarters of the Ichido Corporation.

Gameplay


You will die. Entering each subsequent room might be your last, and your only option is to take out all the enemies, dodging every bullet, laser, and homing missile. To escape, you will have to work hard, as this is a hardcore shooter with roguelike elements, and each weapon has its own elemental damage. Rescue your comrades from capsules and play as them. Defeat bosses and upgrade your character.

Weapons

Have you ever run around with a minigun, dodging everything like a bee? Here, that's exactly what you'll be doing! The coolest pistols, machine guns, and even plasma guns await you, ready to make the corporation surrender. Weapons with elemental damage correspond to each type of health. For instance, electric bullets will quickly disable a shield, while fire bullets will burn the enemy's flesh. You can also combine the damage of different weapons!

Enemies

The corporation's security will try to stop you. Each enemy requires a unique approach in battle. Some will dodge bullets, some will have shields, and a boss might try to crush you with a race car… There is plenty of variety here, but the question is, can you defeat them all?
